calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2021 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Alimento, Llc.'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing Regarding Default Judgment By Court; Declaration Of Yaelle E. Shaham
Off Calendar Mar-02-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Star Custom Builders, LLC, a California limited liability company, Afrim Zeqiri, an individual, and Shera Zeqiri, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Guy O. Kornblum, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Alimento, LLC, a California limited liability company, dba Limoncello.
Jalal Heydari, owner of Alimento, LLC, a California limited liability company, dba Limoncello, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Kornblum and Heydari appeared via ZOOM for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendants Star Custom Builders, LLC, a California limited liability company, Afrim Zeqiri, an individual, or Shera Zeqiri, an individual.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, Negligence, Disgorgement Under California Business & Professions Code Section 7031(b) and Recovery against License Board was filed on March 20, 2019, and personally served on defendants Star Custom Builders, LLC, Afrim Zeqiri and Shera Zeqiri on March 26, 2019.
Plaintiff's Summons & Complaint was personally served on defendant VB Electric on April 3, 2019.
Cross-Complaint by American Contractors Indemnity Company against cross-defendants Star Custom Builders and Shera Zeqiri was filed on May 15, 2019.
Default as to defendants Star Custom Builders, LLC, Afrim Zeqiri and Shera Zeqiri was entered on May 24, 2019.
First Amended cross-complaint was filed on June 25, 2019.
Dismissal of First Amended cross-complaint as to cross-defendant Star Custom Builders was entered on September 10, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on September 30, 2020.
Dismissal of plaintiff's complaint as to defendant VB Electric was filed on November 6, 2019.
Cross-complaint was dismissed on August 6, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Alimento, LLC, a California limited liability company, dba Limoncello, and against the defaulted defendants Star Custom Builders, LLC, a California limited liability company, Afrim Zeqiri, an individual, and Shera Zeqiri, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $94,500.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $14,446.85.
Costs - $90.00.

Total - $109,036.85.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
